title: Restructure Hints as Conceptual Nudges
summary: Replace full-wiring Hint 3 across all 15 levels with a Socratic progression: (1) general concept, (2) structural insight with gate count, (3) visual hint highlighting relevant I/O pins with a conceptual nudge — never the exact topology. Add visual pin highlighting in the canvas renderer when hint 3 is active.

tasks.description: Rewrite all 15 level hint arrays in js/levels.js with Socratic progression: Hint 1 = general concept/question, Hint 2 = structural insight with gate count, Hint 3 = conceptual nudge without full wiring. Add 'hintHighlights' array property to each level listing I/O labels to visually highlight when hint 3 is shown.
acceptance_criteria: No hint for any level contains exact wiring instructions (e.g., 'A → NOT → OR → OUT')
Hint 1 introduces the general concept or asks a guiding question
Hint 2 provides structural insight including the number of gates needed
Hint 3 gives a conceptual nudge about approach without specifying connections
Each level has a 'hintHighlights' array of I/O labels (e.g., ['A', 'B', 'OUT'])

tasks.description: Add activeHintHighlights state management in main.js: set it when hint 3 is shown, clear it on level load and circuit clear.
acceptance_criteria: gameState.activeHintHighlights is set to the level's hintHighlights array when hint 3 (index 2) is revealed
activeHintHighlights is cleared (null) on loadLevel, loadChallengeLevel, clearCircuit, and resetHintState
Hint button still works for all 3 hints with correct penalty logic

tasks.description: Render pulsing gold highlights on I/O nodes in canvas.js when activeHintHighlights is set. Highlight should match the breadboard aesthetic — gold/amber pulse around the relevant input/output nodes.
acceptance_criteria: When hint 3 is active, matching I/O nodes display a pulsing gold glow
Glow uses sine-based animation for smooth pulsing
Highlights do not interfere with normal pin rendering or wire drawing
Highlights disappear when level is cleared or changed

tasks.description: Update showHint in ui.js to add a visual indicator icon for hint 3 (e.g., '👁 Visual Hint' label) to signal that the canvas has visual guidance.
acceptance_criteria: Hint 3 display includes a visual indicator (e.g., '👁' prefix or 'Look at the highlighted pins' suffix) distinguishing it from text-only hints
Hints 1 and 2 display normally without visual indicator

testing_focus: Verify no hint in any level reveals exact wiring
Verify hint 3 triggers visual highlighting on the canvas for all 15 levels
Verify highlights clear on level change and circuit clear
Verify hint penalty system still works (hint 2+ reduces max stars)
Verify hint button text updates correctly through all 3 hints
Verify skip button appears after all hints used or 60s timeout
rollback_criteria: If hint system breaks or visual highlights cause rendering artifacts, revert to previous commit
